jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Emeritus - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Emeritus, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Emeritus:
Emeritus is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus!
